ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset (e.g., images, text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model for which metrics are recorded */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model on the dataset */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model on the dataset */,
  "fmeasure" REAL /* F-measure of the model on the dataset */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error of the model on the dataset */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the metrics were evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation this report is related to */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the evaluation results */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the detailed report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_reports_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of the task (e.g., evaluation, training) */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team is associated with */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating on the model */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being annotated */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_annotations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
